channel.title: Hearing Things
channel.description: Music criticism by a collective of writers

item.title: Kiwi Lenderman and Copycat Extraordinaires
item.description: Plus: fretless guitar and funky drum machine jams from an Orthodox priest in coastal Greece.

item.title: 'Mighty Real' Sets the Record Queer on the History of LGBTQ Music
item.description: Amid a music-writer milieu still dominated by straight perspectives, Barry Walters' new book offers a much-needed alternate history of pop, from the Velvet Underground to RuPaul.

item.title: Myaap Explains Her Credit Card Statement
item.description: The Milwaukee rap princess talks through recent purchases, including designer clothes, dinner for her girlfriend, and a bustdown Tinkerbell pendant.
